Requests that need web pages and product prototypes.

layout_rules: Hero (大标题 + 副标 + 双 CTA + 可视化占位)
现代 SaaS 风: 大字号, 柔和渐变, glassmorphism 卡片, 滚动入场动画
【意图】完整的 SaaS 产品落地页, 把用户内容映射到标准 sections。
style_rules: 现代 SaaS 风: 大字号, 柔和渐变, glassmorphism 卡片, 滚动入场动画
Top nav (logo + 导航 + sign-in + 主 CTA)
Hero (大标题 + 副标 + 双 CTA + 可视化占位)
content_rules: Top nav (logo + 导航 + sign-in + 主 CTA)
Hero (大标题 + 副标 + 双 CTA + 可视化占位)
Features (3-6 个特性卡, icon + 标题 + 描述)
How it works (3 步流程, 数字 + 标题 + 描述)
quality_checks: Use the reference HTML as a style and structure guide, not as final placeholder content.
Preserve user-provided facts, numbers, dates, and claims.
Return one complete standalone HTML file with no markdown wrapper.
Keep visible text readable and avoid overlapping UI or content blocks.
